body: Cross-card constraint: last_verified lives on the routine SKILL.md front-matter local to this card. Card 0022's scenario 2 names a baseline metadata set (name, description, created_by, created_at, pinned); adding last_verified is an additive extension that doesn't break 0022's existing scenarios. No 0022 amendment in this spec — per tabletop escalation trigger #4 option (b).

Cycle-3 review verdict override: 3 surgical findings (AC-01 path c, AC-04 chain_id algorithm, AC-05 DAG scope) applied inline rather than triggering the synthetic BLOCK + iter-2 promote path, because same-day promote.sh collides with the existing spec id and the iter-2 restart would discard accumulated AC work. Spec state at advance-to-implement reflects v3 findings addressed; treat as conditional-APPROVE on review-spec stage. Substrate gap (same-day NO-GO collision) captured in a workflow-refinement memo for future spec.

drive completed: 10 ACs (9 closing-band code/config closed, 1 observation deferred); review-spec 3 cycles (cycle-3 override applied inline per spec.note above); review-pr APPROVE cycle 1; 474/474 workspace tests pass; substrate clean
